violations.text: Chemical spray bottles were hanging from the back hand sink at the time of inspection. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Spray bottles were relocated for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Beverage mixing/stirring utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Proper storage of in-use utensils was discussed with PIC at the time of inspection. (Spoons relocated for proper storage at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The low boy refrigerator door gasket(s) were observed in poor repair (not sealing properly). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
Beverage mixing utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
